response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company name] experienced a decline in revenue or profitability in 2023.  
2. [Company name] saw a decrease in earnings per share in 2023 compared to the previous year.  
3. [Company name] faced a decline in stock price in 2023 relative to previous years.  
4. [Company name] relies heavily on a single product or market segment.  
5. [Company name] experienced an increase in liabilities or debt in 2023.  
6. [Company name] reported lower production or output in 2023 due to external factors or challenges.  
7. [Company name] has no organic products or offerings in 2023.  
8. [Company name] has limited access to outdoor spaces or facilities in 2023.  
9. [Company name] depends on a small number of large customers or suppliers in 2023.  
10. [Company name] faces legal or regulatory challenges in 2023.
